infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PetHealth AI needs camera access to analyze pet photos for health symptoms and breed identification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PetHealth AI needs photo library access to analyze pet images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PetHealth AI needs permission to save analyzed photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app does not use the microphone.

plugins.photosPermission: PetHealth AI needs access to your photos to analyze pet images.
plugins.cameraPermission: PetHealth AI needs access to your camera to take pet photos for health analysis.
